annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: High-level convenience API for third-party integrations and scripts.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Snap a window to a zone by number on a screen.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Toggle between snapping and autotile mode for a screen.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Get complete daemon state snapshot as JSON.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: JSON with layouts, windows, autotile state.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Generate a redacted support report for bug reports and discussions.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Minutes of journal logs to include (0 = default 30, max 120).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Markdown-formatted support report with config, screens, and logs.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Read-only 'what wins here?' query: the effective inner/outer gap for a screen and which scope layer (context-rule, per-screen, layout, global, default) supplied it, resolved through the same cascade as live geometry.
